description_long: This is an old, weathered book with a thick, uneven stack of yellowed pages and a heavily worn cover. The cover appears to be made of a faded, possibly cloth-bound material, with significant discoloration and fraying along the edges. The book's pages are rough and irregular, with some warping and visible stains, suggesting age and frequent handling. The spine is battered, with parts of the outer layer peeling away, exposing the underlying structure. There is faint, handwritten text visible on the top page, but no clear illustration or decorative elements on the cover. The overall appearance is that of a historical or antique volume, possibly a ledger or journal, showing extensive signs of use and time.
description: A heavily worn, antique book with a faded, frayed cover and yellowed, rough-edged pages. The book shows significant age, with visible stains, warping, and handwritten text on the top page.
description_view_0: The book is seen from the side, highlighting the battered spine and the layered, uneven pages with a partially exposed inner binding.
description_view_1: This view shows the book from the opposite side, emphasizing the rough, yellowed page edges and the frayed, discolored cover.
description_view_2: The book is viewed from the back, displaying the full extent of the aged, warped pages and the faded, plain back cover.
description_view_3: The book is seen from the other end, showing the thick, stacked pages and the worn, slightly curved cover edge.
attribute_spine_design: The spine is heavily worn and frayed, with no visible text or decorative elements. The color is a mottled brown and gray, showing exposed material and signs of age.
